overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a fog-covered wooden pier. The character walks through covered and open sections of the waterfront structure, ascends stairs to an upper level, and transitions from wooden planks to a gravel path in a dense, atmospheric fog.

events.description: character exits covered wooden pier structure onto open foggy deck area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered wooden pier toward the open deck

white painted wooden staircase leading to upper level
thick wooden posts supporting the roof structure
weathered wooden planks of the pier walkway
white wooden lounge chairs visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered wooden pier structure with visible support beams and stairs. As they proceed, they exit the covered area onto an open wooden deck where white lounge chairs are visible through the dense fog.

events.description: character turns left and begins walking back toward the building structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the open deck past lounge chairs, then turning to head back toward the covered structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open foggy pier deck past white lounge chairs, then turns left to head back toward a large wooden building structure, passing under the building's overhang.

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing the wooden stairs to reach the upper pier level

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide wooden staircase and ascends to the upper level of the pier, with the building facade falling away to the left and foggy sky becoming visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the upper level of the foggy pier, passing white wooden benches, vintage street lamps, outdoor cafe seating, and a striped food cart, all set against the dense gray fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: gravel path leading to stone stairs in foggy park area

events.description: transition from wooden pier deck to gravel ground surface

agents.ego_description: walking off the wooden pier onto a gravel path toward distant stone stairs

bushes with white flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the wooden pier onto a gravel path surrounded by flowering bushes, walking toward a distant stone staircase that fades into the dense fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a fog-shrouded wooden pier that gradually transitions into a manicured garden path. It begins within a covered pier structure with heavy support beams, moving forward until the character emerges onto an open wooden deck dotted with white lounge chairs. As the camera turns back toward a large wooden building, it follows the character under an overhang and up a wide staircase to an upper level where the building facade recedes to reveal a dense gray sky. The scene then expands across the upper promenade, passing vintage street lamps, cafe seating, and a striped food cart before the wooden planks finally give way to a gravel path. The movement concludes as the character walks past flowering bushes toward a distant stone staircase that fades into the thick mist.
